editionData.title: June 29, 2026: Pakistan says its security forces killed 29 fighters along Afghan border; ‘If I am to die, let it be here’: Malawians fleeing unrest...
editionData.description: Global headlines: Pakistan says its security forces killed 29 fighters along Afghan border (Strikes come a day after fighters armed with guns and explosives killed three soldiers in Karachi); ‘If I am to die, let it be here’: Malawians fleeing unrest in South Africa (A mass return of Malawians from South Africa exposes the cost of migration, violence and broken livelihoods); and Iran insists on sole control of Hormuz amid reports of truce talks with US (Washington and Tehran have agreed to stop attacks and renew talks in the Qatari capital, Doha, Axios reports). Markets leaned lower, with 5 of 7 tracked indexes down; HANG SENG INDEX up 1.84% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks (Among models given nothing but a prompt, the best open-weight option beat Claude Opus 4.8); Historical memory prices 1960-2026 (Historical and current prices for DRAM, HBM, and NAND flash); and Knowledge Distillation of Black-Box Large Language Models (2024) (Given the exceptional performance of proprietary large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4, recent research has increasingly focused on...). Product Hunt features Lyto ("One AI agent across your browser, tools, and messages "), Persona.js (Add WebMCP-native AI chat to any Frontend), and discode.ai (100+ AI models, one interface. ECO friendly).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Pakistan says its security forces killed 29 fighters along Afghan border
headlines.summary: Strikes come a day after fighters armed with guns and explosives killed three soldiers in Karachi.

headlines.title: ‘If I am to die, let it be here’: Malawians fleeing unrest in South Africa
headlines.summary: A mass return of Malawians from South Africa exposes the cost of migration, violence and broken livelihoods.

headlines.title: Iran insists on sole control of Hormuz amid reports of truce talks with US
headlines.summary: Washington and Tehran have agreed to stop attacks and renew talks in the Qatari capital, Doha, Axios reports.

headlines.title: Israel kills four Palestinians in Gaza as attacks on tents continue
headlines.summary: Israeli forces restrict Palestinian worshippers at Al-Aqsa Mosque and block the call to prayer at the Ibrahimi Mosque.

headlines.title: Hope of finding more Venezuela quake survivors fades despite late rescues
headlines.summary: Those rescued include 60-year-old woman trapped for 86 hours, as tens of thousands still reported missing.

headlines.title: A 'heat dome' is driving dangerous heat across the U.S. into the July 4 weekend
headlines.summary: Dangerous heat is expected across large swaths of the U.S. this week, according to the National Weather Service.

headlines.title: In Venezuela, silence has become a rescue tool
headlines.summary: In Venezuela rescue crews now stop almost everything and ask for silence so they can hear anyone still alive underneath the rubble. NPR's Eyder Peralta reports from the port city of La Guaira.

headlines.title: A bridge to Canada may be blocked by the Trump administration
headlines.summary: The Gordie Howe bridge spans the most important border crossing between the U.S. and Canada. President Donald Trump has said he doesn't want it open yet.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes, underscoring the fragility of the ceasefire
headlines.summary: President Trump accused Iran of violating their framework agreement, and Tehran threatened to halt negotiations with the U.S. entirely. Meanwhile, violence continued between Israel and Hezbollah.

headlines.title: Trade tensions shake up Brazil's caipirinha spirit
headlines.summary: U.S. tariff pressure is pushing Europe and Brazil closer—opening new global doors for everything from aircraft parts to Brazil's cachaça, the base of the caipirinha.

headlines.title: EU stands firm despite new US tariff threats
headlines.summary: The European Union's executive arm the European Commission has insisted the 27-member bloc has the sovereign right to regulate economic activity within its area, despite yet more threats from the United States of tariffs on European goods, as part of the long-running row over big tech firms operating within the EU.

headlines.title: Truce comes under strain as US, Iran trade strikes
headlines.summary: Disputes over shipping access in the Strait of Hormuz have sparked fresh tensions between Iran and the United States, with each side accusing the other of breaching a fragile interim accord signed less than two weeks ago to end their four-month conflict, a war that disrupted global maritime trade and sent shockwaves through international energy markets.

headlines.title: Australian wool sector rides evolving market trends
headlines.summary: Australia's pillar wool sector is reaping the rewards from record-high prices as it rides on consumption upgrades and other strengths in its biggest market, China, according to latest figures.

headlines.title: CIIE a platform to enhance Sino-French trade relations
headlines.summary: Two seminars aiming to help French enterprises better understand the upcoming 9th edition of the China International Import Expo, or CIIE, and share opportunities presented by China's deepening opening-up, were held last week in the French cities of Paris and Lyon.

headlines.title: Chinese envoy urges Japan to properly address historical issues
headlines.summary: GENEVA -- A Chinese envoy has urged Japan to address historical issues properly and with sincerity, saying the forced recruitment of "comfort women" constituted a grave crime against humanity committed by Japanese militarism against women.

headlines.title: Sonam Wangchuk joins CJP protest, begins hunger strike at Jantar Mantar
headlines.summary: Sonam Wangchuk initiates a hunger strike at Jantar Mantar, joining CJP's protest for accountability in education and demanding the minister's resignation.

headlines.title: Mann Ki Baat: PM Modi hails self-reliance goals achieved by country
headlines.summary: PM Modi celebrates India's self-reliance achievements and milestones in aviation, yoga, and education during 'Mann Ki Baat'.

headlines.title: ‘Blatant loot’: Congress on MoS Agriculture getting subsidy from own ministry
headlines.summary: Congress criticizes Union Minister Bhagirath Choudhary for approving a ₹99 lakh subsidy for his own farm, calling it "blatant loot."

headlines.title: Ayodhya donations case: Police raids at houses of eight arrested
headlines.summary: Police raided homes of eight arrested in Ayodhya donation embezzlement case, recovering ₹79.85 lakh amid ongoing investigations.

headlines.title: Indian humanitarian assistance reaches Venezuela: Jaishankar on Op. Amistad
headlines.summary: India's Operation Amistad delivers vital humanitarian aid to earthquake-hit Venezuela, including medical supplies and a field hospital.

headlines.title: Stocks adrift, oil up as US-Iran halt renewed attacks
headlines.summary: Reuters: Stocks adrift, oil up as US-Iran halt renewed attacks.

headlines.title: South Korean president to unveil massive AI and chip investment drive
headlines.summary: Reuters: South Korean president to unveil massive AI and chip investment drive.

headlines.title: Father and son rescued after four days buried under rubble of Venezuela's earthquakes
headlines.summary: Reuters: Father and son rescued after four days buried under rubble of Venezuela's earthquakes.

headlines.title: Israel destroys Hezbollah underground infrastructure in southern Lebanon
headlines.summary: Reuters: Israel destroys Hezbollah underground infrastructure in southern Lebanon.

headlines.title: Russian attacks kill five in Ukraine, local officials say
headlines.summary: Reuters: Russian attacks kill five in Ukraine, local officials say.

hackerNews.summary: Among models given nothing but a prompt, the best open-weight option beat Claude Opus 4.8.

hackerNews.title: Historical memory prices 1960-2026
hackerNews.summary: Historical and current prices for DRAM, HBM, and NAND flash.

hackerNews.title: Knowledge Distillation of Black-Box Large Language Models (2024)
hackerNews.summary: Given the exceptional performance of proprietary large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4, recent research has increasingly focused on boosting the capabilities of smaller models through knowledge distillation (KD) from these powerful yet black-box teachers. While leveraging the high-quality outputs of these teachers is advantageous, the inaccessibility of their internal states often limits effective knowledge transfer. To overcome this limitation, we introduce Proxy-KD, a novel method that uses a proxy model to facilitate the efficient transfer of knowledge from black-box LLMs to smaller models. Our experiments show that Proxy-KD not only enhances the performance of KD from black-box teacher models but also surpasses traditional white-box KD techniques.~This approach presents a compelling new avenue for distilling knowledge from advanced LLMs.

hackerNews.title: 5k menus from the New York Public Library’s Buttolph Collection (1880-1920)
hackerNews.summary: What do America’s earliest restaurant menus teach us about America?

hackerNews.title: I used Claude Code to get a second opinion on my MRI
hackerNews.summary: Welcome to my personal blog! I use it to share what I'm currently learning or thinking about, usually on topics related to technology, business, and health.

hackerNews.title: AI boom risks global financial crash, warn central bankers
hackerNews.summary: Reversal of ‘excessive’ tech investments could have serious economic consequences, report finds

hackerNews.title: Tell Congress: Don't Force Age Checks Online
hackerNews.summary: Congress is preparing to vote on the KIDS Act, a sweeping internet bill that would pressure websites and apps to determine users’ ages before allowing them to read websites, send private messages, or participate in online communities.

hackerNews.title: TOP500 at ISC’26: We have a New Number 1 Supercomputer
Show HN: Zanagrams
hackerNews.summary: A free daily word puzzle. Drag across the letters to find the hidden words and watch the grid shrink as you solve it.
